notes.headline: College Football Playoff National Championship Presented by AT&T

headlines.description: — Fernando Mendoza lowered his pads into a defender, spun in a full circle, used his hand to keep his balance, then launched himself horizontally and reached the ball over the goal line — an...
headlines.shortLinkText: Indiana completes undefeated season and wins first national title, beating Miami 27-21 in CFP final

video.headline: Indiana holds off Miami to win 1st national championship in program history
